jd_text: Job Description Position: Executive Secretary to the CEO Reporting To: Chief Executive Officer (CEO)/General Manager Location: Doha, Qatar Employment Type: Full-time Looking for a high-impact Executive Secretary who has thrived alongside founders or senior leaders at fast- growing startups or scale-ups and is excited to help build a company in growth mode. You will act as a strategic extension of CEO/GM, helping bring clarity to competing priorities, protect focus, and ensure that time is spent on what matters most as the company scales. Key Responsibilities Executive & Administrative Support  Deliver comprehensive administrative support to the CEO and, when required, the Executive Leadership Team, including managing calendars, scheduling meetings, arranging travel, preparing documents, and handling correspondence  Act as a trusted gatekeeper, optimizing the CEO’s time and priorities Communication & Stakeholder Management  Serve as the primary point of contact for internal and external stakeholders  Screen, prioritize, and manage incoming communications to ensure effective information flow  Build and maintain strong professional relationships with board members, senior executives, clients, and partners, representing the CEO and the organization with professionalism Meeting & Event Coordination  Plan, coordinate, and execute CEO-led meetings, leadership sessions, and events, including agendas, logistics, materials preparation, and follow-up on action items  Take and maintain accurate minutes, ensuring all decisions and action points are tracked and communicated Information & Documentation Management  Maintain accurate, organized, and confidential records of CEO / Executive Leadership Team activities, projects, and contacts  Prepare, review, and edit reports, presentations, briefings, and other documents with high attention to detail and adherence to deadlines Project Coordination & Strategic Initiatives  Assist in managing special projects and CEO-led initiatives, including timeline planning, stakeholder alignment, progress tracking, and delivery  Identify opportunities to streamline processes, improve efficiency, and enhance organizational effectiveness within the Office of the CEO Follow-Up & Action Tracking  Monitor commitments, deadlines, and follow-ups from CEO and Executive Leadership Team activities  Ensure timely reminders and coordination to achieve outcomes effectively Confidentiality & Discretion  Handle highly sensitive and confidential information with the utmost discretion, integrity, and professionalism Continuous Improvement  Proactively identify and implement improvements in executive office operations, workflows, and administrative systems  Support a positive, productive, and high-performing executive environment Candidate Requirements:  5+ years of experience supporting a CEO or senior C-suite executive in a high-growth environment.  Maintains a professional appearance and demeanor that reflects the standards of the CEO and the organization.  Strong executive presence and confidence interacting with senior leaders and stakeholders.  Proactive, resourceful, and able to exercise sound judgment independently.  Excellent organizational and time-management skills, with the ability to juggle multiple priorities.  Relationship management skills, multilingual, with excellent command of English..  Strong proficiency in Microsoft Office (Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Outlook) and Google Workspace.  Passion for building structure, improving processes, and enabling leadership teams to operate at their best.  Comfort working across time zones in a fast-paced, scaling startup/growing environment
